overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running along a tropical beach with turquoise water, exploring a post-apocalyptic coastal environment with shipwreck remains, rocky formations, and dense forests. The character transitions from running on sand to wading through shallow lagoons and swimming, showcasing the game's detailed water physics and natural environments.

agents.ego_description: running along the sandy beach parallel to the ocean, approaching shipwreck remains in the shallow water

entered.detail: wooden remains of a shipwreck emerging from the turquoise water
large rocky outcrops along the distant shoreline
dense green forest lining the coast with tall trees
hazy mountain range visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wide tropical beach with bright turquoise water to the right. Wooden shipwreck posts emerge from the shallow water in the distance, while rocky outcrops and dense tropical forests line the left side of the beach under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: character steps into shallow ocean water and begins wading through the gentle surf

agents.ego_description: transitioning from running on dry sand to wading through shallow shoreline water

entered.detail: sandy shoal visible in the shallow lagoon water

segments.scene_description: Moving along the shoreline, the character enters the shallow turquoise water, wading through gentle waves. The shipwreck remains pass behind as large rock formations become more prominent in the center of the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow lagoon with sandbars and rocky islands

events.description: character briefly runs across exposed sandbar before re-entering deeper water
character begins swimming as the water becomes too deep for wading

agents.ego_description: crossing the lagoon by wading and swimming around sandbars and rocky outcrops

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a shallow lagoon, briefly running across a sandbar before swimming through deeper turquoise water. Large rock formations dominate the right side of the frame while the distant forested shoreline remains visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep lagoon and rocky beach exit

events.description: character exits the water onto a rocky section of beach and resumes running

agents.ego_description: swimming through deep water then climbing onto the beach and continuing to run along the coast

entered.detail: sandy beach with scattered rocks and boulders at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: Swimming through the deep clear lagoon, the character reaches the opposite shore and exits the water onto a sandy beach with scattered rocks, continuing to explore the coastline with large rock formations passing by on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a tropical coastline that transitions from a sandy beach run into a wade through shallow turquoise waters. It begins with the character sprinting across a wide stretch of bright sand, flanked by dense tropical forests and rocky outcrops on the left and a shimmering ocean on the right. As the character moves forward, the perspective shifts toward the shoreline where wooden shipwreck posts emerge from the distance. The scene then opens further into the sea as the character enters the gentle waves, wading through the clear water while the shipwreck remains recede and large rock formations become the central focus of the view.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from a shallow lagoon to a sandy coastline. It begins with the character traversing a shallow lagoon, briefly running across a sandbar before diving into deeper turquoise water. As the character swims through the clear depths, large rock formations dominate the right side of the frame while a distant forested shoreline remains visible. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the opposite shore and exits the water onto a sandy beach. Finally, the camera continues to follow the character's exploration along the coastline, passing by scattered rocks and towering formations.
